incidents.impact: Traffic delays are likely near the incident location.

incidents.title: Developing: PCMC to issue notice to contractor, environment dept over Moshi tragedy
incidents.summary: The directions were issued by PCMC commissioner Dr Vijay Suryawanshi during a review meeting on Sunday after the 84-hour rescue operation concluded with the recovery of the ninth victim
incidents.impact: Emergency access and local movement may be restricted while rescue work continues.
incidents.recommendedAction: Keep clear of the site and do not obstruct emergency vehicles.

incidents.title: Developing: Pimpri Chinchwad building collapse: Municipal Commissioner directs officials to register police case against contractor
incidents.summary: Reported by ANI. Official confirmation is awaited.
incidents.impact: The area may remain hazardous while rescue, recovery or safety checks continue.
incidents.recommendedAction: Avoid the immediate area and follow police, fire-service or civic instructions.
